Have empathy for the victims, not those who inflict pain on others


Resist the Mainstream (@ResisttheMS)

WATCH: Elon Musk points out that "the fundamental moral flaw of the left is empathy for the criminals and not empathy for the victims."

"It's undermining the people's faith in the legal system. It needs to stop."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ResisttheMS/status/2034932963620921731#m

No matter the crime, they won’t deport someone who votes for them


Scott Jennings (@ScottJenningsKY)

They vote against deporting migrants who harm humans. What did you expect?



— https://nitter.net/ScottJenningsKY/status/2034924244157493752#m

Inevitably, this will be 4/20 😂


Tesla Europe, Middle East & Africa (@teslaeurope)

Together with RDW, we have officially completed the final vehicle testing phase for Full Self-Driving (Supervised) and have submitted all documentation required for the UN R-171 approval + Article 39 exemptions. The RDW team is now reviewing the documentation and test results package internally. They have communicated the expected approval for Netherlands date of 4/10, shifting from 3/20 previously and we look f

Try using @Grok for your taxes!


jimmah (@jamesdouma)

.@grok just saved my sister $1,441 on her taxes.  I had it check the turbotax output and it found a mistake.  Seriously - 4.20 is very good with taxes.



— https://nitter.net/jamesdouma/status/2034785285205369074#m

Madness


Joshua D Phillips (@JoshPhillipsPhD)

The more I read this, the more I realize how it is utterly illiterate. 

How exactly do you decolonize someone’s birthplace? He lived there. No one came in and conquered his house. It’s just a house of a man that exists. 

These people are exhausting 

🙄





— https://nitter.net/JoshPhillipsPhD/status/2034752518555586859#m
